title: pelargonium rubens
intro: Pelargonium rubens, also known as Red-leaved Geranium or Red Sage, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium rubens include relief from cold and flu symptoms, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
